rows.label: tev061301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Popo why she is here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Popo if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Is friend sightseeing too? This
place so pure and white and
mystical as far as eye can see![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Nothing at all like home
of Popo in Cauldros![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Popo would move here in heartbeat
if Dadapon allowed it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0004
rows.name:
But that will never happen.
Dadapon way too strict.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Oh well! All that really matter is Popo
enjoying special time with beloved Nio.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Nio been stealing glances at shop
over there this whole time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0009
rows.name:
Popo hope he not planning
to buy anything funny.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0010
rows.name: Like...one of those pollen orbs...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0011
rows.name:
No, Nio never do that. Nio not that
kind of Nopon! Popo just worry too
much because of love for Nio.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Popo about her dress.

rows.label: tev061301_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Popo about recent developments.

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Popo put away pure white dress given
by Nio in order to keep it safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Popo and Nio promise to save up
enough money for wedding first.
Time for dress will come![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0014
rows.name:
Right now Popo need to tighten purse
strings. No more wasteful spending![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Popo not need rich and extravagant
life of movie star. Credit
saved is credit earned![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Popo has made up mind and decided
not to return home to Dadapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Instead, Popo will marry Nio and
live right here in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Popo not want Nio to go through trouble
just because family of Popo have money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0022
rows.name:
Popo would rather just say
good-bye to money! Time for
clean slate on new continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0023
rows.name:
And Popo have friend to thank for helping
Popo arrive at this bold decision.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061301_MSG0024
rows.name:
Thanks, [ST:playername ]! If friend had not started
hullabaloo over ring, Popo might have
been mired in indecision for all time.[ST:wait ]
